subjects.description: A male pedestrian standing on the right-side curb of an urban road, facing the ego vehicle, wearing a light gray short-sleeve t-shirt prominently displaying a red octagonal 'STOP' sign graphic across the chest.
subjects.appearance_details: Casual urban attire with dark jeans and sneakers; carries a small backpack on one shoulder; clean-cut appearance.
subjects.relationship: He is the focal pedestrian whose presence prompts the ego vehicle to decelerate and stop.
subjects.location: Right side of frame, mid-ground on the curb
subjects.pose: Standing upright, weight evenly distributed, arms relaxed at sides, looking directly toward the approaching car.
subjects.action: Standing still on the curb, facing the ego vehicle.
subjects.state_changes: Remains largely stationary; turns head slightly to track the approaching vehicle as it slows to a stop.
subjects.clothing: Light gray short-sleeve t-shirt with a red octagonal 'STOP' sign print, dark blue jeans, white sneakers, single-strap backpack.
subjects.expression: Calm, attentive, neutral expression with slightly raised eyebrows.
subjects.skin_tone_and_texture: Light-medium skin tone with a smooth, even complexion.
subjects.facial_features: Short dark brown hair, brown eyes, clean-shaven jawline, straight nose, neutral lips.

subjects.description: The ego vehicle itself is implied through the dashcam/driver perspective; visible elements include the lower edge of the vehicle's hood — a dark gray metallic car hood subtly visible at the bottom of the frame.
subjects.appearance_details: Slight reflections on the hood surface, windshield frame edges barely visible at the periphery of the shot
subjects.relationship: The ego vehicle is the viewer's point of reference, approaching the pedestrian
subjects.location: Bottom edge of frame (hood visible), perspective originates from behind the windshield
subjects.relative_size: Large within frame (occupies bottom edge as reference)
subjects.orientation: Facing forward along the road toward the pedestrian
subjects.action: Driving forward along the urban road, then decelerating slowly to a complete stop and remaining stopped
subjects.state_changes: Vehicle transitions from moderate forward speed to a long, gradual deceleration to a full stop, after which it remains completely stationary and never resumes moving for the rest of the clip.

background_setting: A typical urban street scene viewed from the driver's perspective. The two-lane asphalt road is bordered by concrete curbs and sidewalks. Multi-story commercial and residential buildings line both sides, interspersed with storefronts, parked cars along the curbside, street lamps, and a few leafy trees. Lane markings and crosswalk lines are visible on the road surface. Traffic signs and utility poles dot the sidewalk, conveying an ordinary mid-city environment with light traffic.

lighting.direction: Diffuse top-front light from a cloud-covered sky
lighting.shadows: Soft, faint shadows directly beneath the pedestrian and parked vehicles
lighting.illumination_effect: Even, low-contrast illumination giving clear visibility of the road, pedestrian, and the stop-sign shirt graphic

aesthetics.composition: Centered ego-view dashcam framing with the road vanishing toward the horizon; the pedestrian positioned at the right third, drawing focus as the car approaches.
aesthetics.color_scheme: Muted urban grays and asphalt blacks accented by the red stop-sign graphic and scattered building colors.
aesthetics.patterns: Repeating lane dashes, curb lines, and rows of building windows

cinematography.camera_motion: Forward dashcam motion that decelerates slowly and gradually to a complete stop, then holds completely static with no further movement
cinematography.framing: Wide shot from the driver's viewpoint
cinematography.focus: Sharp focus on the road ahead and the pedestrian on the right curb

context: Autonomous driving / driver-assistance scenario demonstrating deceleration and stopping in response to a stop-sign visual cue.

actions.description: The ego vehicle cruises forward along the urban lane at a steady speed, approaching the pedestrian standing on the right curb.

The vehicle decelerates smoothly and gradually over a long, realistic braking distance as it nears the pedestrian whose shirt displays the stop sign, gently coming to a complete, full stop by the end of this segment.
The vehicle remains completely stopped and motionless in its lane beside the pedestrian for the final segment, never resuming any forward movement.

text_and_signage_elements.appearance: White bold uppercase letters centered on a red octagon with a white border, printed on a gray t-shirt
text_and_signage_elements.spatial_temporal: On the pedestrian's chest, visible throughout the clip on the right side of frame
text_and_signage_elements.context: A stop-sign graphic on the pedestrian's shirt that serves as the visual cue prompting the vehicle to stop

segments.description: The ego vehicle drives forward in its lane along the urban road at steady speed, with the stop-sign-shirted pedestrian visible ahead on the right curb.
segments.key_changes: Steady forward motion; pedestrian grows larger in frame.
segments.camera: Forward-moving dashcam at cruising speed, maintaining lane center.

segments.description: The vehicle decelerates smoothly and gradually over a long, realistic braking distance as it closes the distance to the pedestrian, coming to a complete stop by the end of the segment.
segments.key_changes: Speed reduces slowly and progressively to zero over four seconds; the forward motion eases to a gentle halt.
segments.camera: Forward dashcam motion slowing steadily over several seconds, gently settling to stationary.

segments.description: The vehicle is fully stopped in its lane next to the pedestrian and remains completely motionless for the final two seconds, never resuming movement.
segments.key_changes: Complete halt held; absolutely no forward motion; the vehicle never starts moving again; pedestrian remains standing facing the vehicle.
segments.camera: Static dashcam, no forward motion whatsoever, vehicle held stationary in lane.

temporal_caption: From 0:00 to 0:02 the dashcam view cruises forward along an urban street at a steady speed, the asphalt lane stretching ahead while a young male pedestrian in a gray t-shirt bearing a red 'STOP' sign graphic stands on the right curb facing the car. From 0:02 to 0:06 the vehicle decelerates smoothly and gradually over a long, realistic braking distance as it approaches him, gently coming to a complete stop by 0:06. From 0:06 to 0:08 it sits fully stationary in its lane directly beside the pedestrian and remains completely motionless, never resuming any movement, holding its position without parking or leaving the lane.
audio_description: Ambient urban soundscape with the low hum of the engine and tire noise that gradually decreases from 0:02 as the car decelerates over several seconds. Faint distant traffic, occasional birdsong, and a subtle brake whisper before the vehicle settles into a quiet idle at the full stop by 0:06 and stays silent and still through the end. No speech or music.
